payload.goal: 帮我两周内我要做一个智能体工具出来
帮我两周内我要做一个智能体工具出来

task_brief.goal: 帮我两周内我要做一个智能体工具出来

task_card.goal: 帮我两周内我要做一个智能体工具出来

steps.title: Research existing AI agent tools
steps.description: Search for existing AI agent frameworks, APIs, and tools. Identify popular solutions like LangChain, AutoGPT, etc. Assess their capabilities and suitability for the project.
steps.expected_output: List of candidate technologies and tools with pros/cons

steps.title: Define requirements and scope
steps.description: Based on research, define what the AI agent should do (e.g., task automation, conversational, etc.). Outline core features and limitations due to time constraint.

steps.title: Design system architecture
steps.description: Design the overall architecture: components like agent brain, memory, tools integration, user interface. Decide on communication protocols.

steps.title: Select technology stack
steps.description: Choose programming language, AI models (e.g., GPT API), frameworks, and cloud services. Ensure stack is compatible and allows rapid development.

steps.title: Set up development environment
steps.description: Initialize repository, configure development tools, install dependencies, set up local or cloud environment for AI model access.
steps.expected_output: Development environment ready with version control

steps.title: Implement core agent logic
steps.description: Develop the main agent loop: perception, reasoning, action. Integrate with chosen AI model for natural language understanding and generation.

steps.title: Integrate tools and plugins
steps.description: Add capabilities such as web search, file access, calculator, etc. Ensure agent can call external tools via plugins or APIs.

steps.title: Develop user interface
steps.description: Create a simple chat or command-line interface for users to interact with the agent. Include history and feedback mechanisms.

steps.title: Testing and debugging
steps.description: Perform unit tests, integration tests, and user acceptance testing. Fix bugs and improve reliability. Ensure safety and ethical use.
steps.expected_output: Test report and bug fixes applied

steps.title: Documentation and deployment
steps.description: Write user documentation, API docs if applicable. Prepare deployment package (e.g., Docker, web service). Deploy to a suitable platform.

task_card.goal: 研究 AI Agent 市场并生成报告

steps.title: 定义研究范围
steps.description: 确定AI Agent市场的关键领域、目标受众和报告结构，列出关键问题。
steps.expected_output: 研究范围文档，包含关键问题和报告大纲。

steps.title: 进行网络搜索
steps.description: 使用网络搜索工具收集关于AI Agent市场的最新数据、报告、新闻和公司信息。
steps.expected_output: 收集的原始数据和来源链接。

steps.title: 分析数据
steps.description: 整理和分析收集到的信息，识别市场趋势、主要参与者、技术动态和关键指标。
steps.expected_output: 结构化分析文档，包含关键发现和图表。

steps.title: 撰写报告
steps.description: 基于分析结果撰写AI Agent市场研究报告，涵盖市场概述、增长驱动、竞争格局和未来预测。

steps.title: 审核与定稿
steps.description: 对报告进行审核，修正错误，完善内容，并生成最终版本。

fallbacks: 如果网络搜索不可用，则使用内置知识库或预设数据集。
如果收集的数据不足，则扩展搜索范围到相邻市场（如AI整体市场、特定行业AI应用）。
success_criteria: 报告包含市场定义、规模估算、主要参与者、技术趋势和预测。
报告以用户指定的格式保存（如PDF、Markdown或Word）。

payload.goal: 研究 AI Agent 市场并生成报告
